PERF.CUIDADOR_DESC: Primary caregiver linked to your family legacy.
PERF.INVITADO_DESC: Has invited you to link as your primary caregiver!
PERF.SOLICITUD_PENDIENTE_DESC: Waiting for your family member to accept the sent invitation.
PERF.SIN_VINCULAR_DESC: You currently do not have a linked family caregiver. Request one to share memories, schedule activities, and preserve your legacy together.
CAT.SUBTITULO: Choose the subscription that best fits your memory and bitacora needs
PAY.SUBTITULO: You are one step away from expanding your memory bitacora completely safely.
PAY.PLAN_DESC: Optimized memory space, high-quality downloads, and no ads.
PAY.QR_DESC: Scan with Yape, Plin, or Mobile Banking
PAY.SEGURIDAD_DESC: We comply with PCI-DSS security standards. Your financial data is never stored on our servers.
PAY.NUMERO_TARJETA_HELP: Enter the 16 digits on the front of your card without spaces.
PAY.CVC_HELP: 3 digits on the back of the card.
PAY.EMAIL_HELP: We will send the digital invoice receipt to this address.
PAY.TERMINOS_FOOTER: By clicking Pay, you agree to the automatic monthly renewal and terms of use.
PAY.INSTRUCCION_1: Open your favorite mobile wallet application on your cell phone.
PAY.INSTRUCCION_2: Select the Scan QR option and point it at the screen.
PAY.INSTRUCCION_3: Verify that the amount matches exactly.
PAY.ZIP_HELP: Required as a security check for your residential address.
PAY.BOTON_QR: I already made my QR Payment
PAY.QR_FOOTER: The system will check for the transfer automatically to activate your subscription.
INICIO.TITULO: What would you like to do today?
INICIO.SUBTITULO: Choose an option to start preserving your memories
INICIO.ESCRIBIR_MEMORIAS_DESC: Write family stories, experiences, and reflections
INICIO.GRABAR_AUDIO_DESC: Narrate favorite memories in your own voice
INICIO.FOTO_DESC: Upload pictures of loved moments and faces
INICIO.VER_RECUERDOS_DESC: Explore your soul journal and review your log
CHAT.VACIO: Start the conversation by sending a message to your family caregiver!
CHAT.VINCULO_REQUERIDO: You do not currently have a linked caregiver. Please go to your profile to link your family member before starting a chat.
REC_TEXTO.INTRO: Write a story about your experiences, your life events, or a message for your loved ones.
REC_TEXTO.PLACEHOLDER_TITULO: e.g., The day we moved into our first home...
REC_TEXTO.PLACEHOLDER_RELATO: Feel free to write everything you remember here...
REC_TEXTO.CAMPOS_VACIOS_DESC: Please write the title and story of your memory.
REC_TEXTO.SAVE_SUCCESS_DESC: Your written memory has been successfully saved.
REC_TEXTO.SAVE_ERROR_DESC: Could not save the memory to the server.
REC_AUDIO.INTRO: Click on the microphone to start your recording. You can talk freely about your anecdotes or family messages.
REC_AUDIO.PLACEHOLDER_TITULO: e.g., Story of my school years...
REC_AUDIO.STATUS_RECORDING: 🎙 Listening to your voice! Press the button to finish.
REC_AUDIO.STATUS_START: Press the circle to start speaking
REC_AUDIO.SAVE_SUCCESS_DESC: Your voice memory has been successfully saved.
REC_FOTO.INTRO: Capture a photo from your camera or upload a file from your device to save it in your legacy.
REC_FOTO.CLICK_CARGAR: Click here to upload your family photo
REC_FOTO.SAVE_SUCCESS_DESC: Your photo memory has been successfully saved.
RECUERDOS.VACIO_DESC: Start creating your digital legacy by writing your first memory
RECUERDOS.NO_ENCONTRADOS_DESC: You haven't saved memories in this category yet or the search doesn't match.
RECUERDOS.CONFIRM_DELETE_DESC: This action cannot be undone. It will be permanently deleted from your legacy.
RECUERDOS.DELETE_SUCCESS_DESC: The memory has been removed from your journal.
GALERIA.INTRO: Paint your memories and fantasies with Artificial Intelligence. All illustrations you created with Stability AI are saved here.
GALERIA.PROMPT_PREGUNTA: What would you like to paint today?
GALERIA.PROMPT_INSTRUCCION: Describe an idea, a dream, or an endearing memory and our Artificial Intelligence will turn it into a beautiful illustration for your digital album.
GALERIA.PROMPT_PLACEHOLDER: Example: A smiling grandfather fishing in a calm lake with his grandson at sunset, realistic oil style...
GALERIA.LABEL_TITULO: Give a title to your illustration
GALERIA.PLACEHOLDER_TITULO: Example: Fishing afternoon at the lake
GALERIA.VACIO_DESC: Generate your first illustration with artificial intelligence
LEGADO.VERIFICACION_DESC: To access your favorite memories, please enter the 6-digit code.
LEGADO.INTRO_PANEL: Your footprint in the world. Here are gathered all the favorite memories and stories you have marked with a heart.
LEGADO.VACIO_TITULO: You don't have favorite memories yet
LEGADO.VACIO_DESC: Go to your Memories log and press the heart on the stories you like most to see them here.
